sql.query: SELECT a.op, a.dl_change_seq, TO_DATE(a.updatedt, 'yyyyMMdd') as updatedt, TO_DATE(a.updatedt, 'yyyyMMdd') as archivedt, a.dl_timestamp, a.dealid, a.dealname, a.bloombergname, a.dealtype, ON a.dealid = m.dealid AND a.curdistribdt = m.curdistribdt WHERE a.dealrownumber=1
